description: Frozen schema contract for the gold views the SPC app depends on. Runtime assertion on /api/ready compares this to live information_schema and fails the readiness probe on any diff. See docs/DATA_CONTRACT.md for rationale and change procedure.

gold_batch_quality_result_v.description: Per-sample inspection result from SAP QM, denormalized to the batch level. Primary series for all variable/attribute control charts.

QUANTITATIVE_RESULT.note: Cast to DOUBLE in DAL; NULL for attribute characteristics

QUALITATIVE_RESULT.note: Present for attribute characteristics; may be empty string

TARGET_VALUE.note: Cast to DOUBLE as nominal; varies by MIC

TOLERANCE.note: Either symmetric ('±0.5') or asymmetric ('0.3...0.7') — parsed by LOCATE('...')

gold_batch_mass_balance_v.description: Plant-level batch provenance. Used to filter quality results to a specific producing plant and to order chart points by posting date.

POSTING_DATE.note: Either DATE or TIMESTAMP — DAL tolerates both

gold_material.description: Material master data. Used for display name only; not on any hot path.
